title: Jackie Robinson
description: Baseball pioneer remembered for breaking barriers in professional sports.

quiz.q: Jackie Robinson is famous in which sport?
quiz.explanation: Robinson is one of baseball's most famous pioneers.

quiz.q: Why is Jackie Robinson important in history?
choices: He broke major racial barriers in pro sports
quiz.explanation: He broke major racial barriers in professional sports.

quiz.q: Lessons on Jackie Robinson often focus on what?
quiz.explanation: His story highlights courage and perseverance.

quiz.q: Robinson's legacy reaches beyond sports because of what?
quiz.explanation: His impact goes far beyond athletics.

quiz.q: Why is Robinson called a sport icon?
choices: He changed the meaning of representation in sports
quiz.explanation: He changed representation in sports history.

title: Serena Williams
description: Tennis champion celebrated for excellence, dominance, and lasting influence.

quiz.q: Serena Williams is best known for which sport?
quiz.explanation: She is one of the most famous tennis champions ever.

quiz.q: Why is Serena Williams often included in sport icon lessons?
quiz.explanation: She represents excellence and major influence in sports.

quiz.q: A lesson about Serena often highlights what?
quiz.explanation: Her career reflects discipline and achievement.

quiz.q: Serena's influence reaches beyond sports because of what?
quiz.explanation: Her impact includes representation and culture.

quiz.q: Why is Serena Williams considered a lasting icon?
choices: Her success changed expectations in her sport
quiz.explanation: Her success changed expectations in tennis.
